data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Fix correctly replaces h-full with flex-1 min-h-0 on Tabs container and adds shrink-0 to Separator/SheetFooter in settings-sheet.tsx. Standard flexbox pattern that ensures Save/Reset buttons remain visible in both basic and advanced dispatch modes. Single file, 3 class changes, 0 logic changes. All quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, typecheck clean, build succeeds).
